notes: Rodin (Hyper3D Rodin) is Deemos Technology's image-to-3D and text-to-3D generative model (2024-2025), named after French sculptor Auguste Rodin. Anglicized as roh-DAN: stress on the SECOND syllable, final '-DAN' rhyming with the name Dan (/dæn/), per Wikipedia's English IPA /roʊˈdæn/. Non-native devs wrongly read it as 'ROH-din' or 'ROD-in' with English spelling stress; it's non-obvious because the French-derived name stresses the final syllable and its nasal ending anglicizes to '-an' rather than '-in'.
